side_effects.description: very dry, red, itchy swollen eyes occurring 3 times, most severe first time

protocol_notes: Similar reactions 3 times, first most severe lasting 2 days. Treated with Claritin and Systane eye drops, resolved quickly. Started taking Claritin before shots and ensuring hydration. Reasoned reaction could be eye dryness from dehydration exacerbated by rubbing. Always has epipens on hand. Reactions decreased after protocol changes - now only slight dryness. Recommends small starting dose <0.25mg if trying again after reaction, with Claritin and hydration.
